channel.title: All latest Smart Watch on Hugo Commerce Boilerplate
channel.description: Recent content in All latest Smart Watch on Hugo Commerce Boilerplate

item.title: Starter Product Eight
item.description: A final sample product to round out the starter catalog while you customize the storefront for your own brand.

item.title: Starter Product Five
item.description: Keep this file as a content example or remove it once your real PocketBase sync begins populating products.

item.title: Starter Product Four
item.description: Swap the imagery, price, options, and description to quickly turn this sample into a branded product page.

item.title: Starter Product One
item.description: Sample product description for the boilerplate. Replace this copy with your real product story, specs, and merchandising details.

item.title: Starter Product Seven
item.description: Use this page to test reviews, inquiries, image resizing, and related product sections before connecting production data.

item.title: Starter Product Six
item.description: The boilerplate supports a mix of static content and runtime commerce flows, so sample products are useful for early theming.

item.title: Starter Product Three
item.description: This placeholder product helps you verify multilingual routes, card components, and detail page rendering.

item.title: Starter Product Two
item.description: Use this sample entry to test product layouts, image galleries, pricing display, and add-to-cart interactions.
